scripts.synth:dev: npm run cdk -- synth ohara-dev-StatefulStack ohara-dev-StatelessStack ohara-dev-GlobalStack
scripts.diff:dev: npm run cdk -- diff ohara-dev-StatefulStack ohara-dev-StatelessStack
scripts.deploy:dev: npm run cdk -- deploy ohara-dev-StatelessStack ohara-dev-StatefulStack ohara-dev-GlobalStack --require-approval never
scripts.destroy:dev: cdk destroy ohara-dev-StatefulStack ohara-dev-StatelessStack ohara-dev-GlobalStack --require-approval never
scripts.diff:staging: npm run cdk -- diff ohara-staging-StatefulStack ohara-staging-StatelessStack ohara-staging-GlobalStack
scripts.deploy:staging: npm run cdk -- deploy ohara-staging-StatefulStack ohara-staging-StatelessStack ohara-staging-GlobalStack --require-approval never
scripts.destroy:staging: cdk destroy ohara-staging-StatefulStack ohara-staging-StatelessStack ohara-staging-GlobalStack --require-approval never
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run cdk -- deploy prod-StatefulStack prod-StatelessStack
